listing_like_precision.detail: 4/4 -- all are mubawab.ma /fr/is/ individual-listing-pattern URLs, matching the domain's own strongIndividual regex, not category/search pages

partner_mislabeling.detail: origin_type=persisted_openserp on all 4, never a partner-facing value (enforced by assertOpenSerpOriginIsNeverPartnerFacing)

internal_links_on_external.detail: this mission creates no routing, no /listings/[id] pages for external results

false_zero_prices.detail: 3/4 price_status=not_disclosed (no price found), 1/4 price_status=valid (5000 MAD) -- never 0

known_open_item.description: 1 of the 4 admitted listings (property_listings.id=539) has transaction_type='sale' despite a title reading 'a Louer' (rent) -- written before the transaction_type_inconsistent defense-in-depth check existed. Left as-is (not deleted, not silently corrected) per the mission's own 'never invent/never silently fix' doctrine. Flagged here for a future manual review/correction mission.
known_open_item.note: The new consistency check would reject this exact pattern going forward (verified by test); it cannot retroactively fix data written before it existed.
